behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the file path, method name, required comment phrases verbatim, and prohibited patterns, all of which tests assert on.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction dictates exact comment strings ('move past StartObject to first PropertyName', etc.), the exact API to use (ValueTextEquals), and prohibits specific patterns, effectively specifying the implementation.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_correct_read_skip_pattern requires the exact comment '// skip the value' on the Skip() line and '// move to the property value' on a preceding Read() line; alternative correct fixes with different comments would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: All f2p tests (test_valuetextequals_usage, test_no_old_property_name_variable, test_reader_advancement_comments, test_correct_read_skip_pattern, test_valuetextequals_in_property_loop) are grep-style string checks on file content; none execute the GetDiscriminator method.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests check for specific code patterns that stub implementations wouldn't include; a stub returning null wouldn't pass these string-presence assertions.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover each of the four requirements: ValueTextEquals usage, Read-Skip-Read pattern, comments, and prohibited patterns.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have descriptive names and docstrings explaining fail-to-pass vs pass-to-pass purposes.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task doesn't produce structured data output.

no_typos.reason: No typos detected in paths, commands, or identifiers.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction specifies exact comment phrases, exact method (ValueTextEquals), and exact prohibited patterns like 'propertyName == name' and 'string? propertyName = readerClone.GetString()', giving away the solution verbatim.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, not an agentmd-edits task.
